project_type: pnpm monorepo with Next.js 15 + Fastify backends
build_system: pnpm 10 + turbo (root scripts: build, typecheck, test, lint)
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm install, 2. typecheck passes, 3. tests pass, 4. No new lint errors
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network. Node 22, pnpm 10. No Docker daemon available for testing.
contribution_requirements: One feature per PR block, typecheck green, tests pass, use established proxy pattern, shared-ui components, brand tokens
key_patterns: 1. API proxy: apps use Next.js App Router src/app/api/[...]/route.ts that calls proxyToBackend(request, '/backend-path'). 2. proxyToBackend is a local _lib/proxy.ts utility per app. 3. ApiClient classes in src/services/api-client.ts currently point to hardcoded localhost URLs - need to change to relative /api paths. 4. All apps use @quant/brand springs, @quant/shared-ui components, framer-motion. 5. QuantMeet has useLiveKit hook using getUserMedia. 6. QuantDocs has useYjsDoc hook with real WebSocket. 7. CommandPaletteUI already exists in shared-ui. 8. QuantTube uses Pages Router (src/pages/), others with Next.js 15 use App Router (src/app/). 9. QuantMax/QuantEdits ApiClient already uses relative /api paths.
directory_structure: Root monorepo: apps/ has 17 Next.js apps each with backend/ (Fastify) and src/ (Next.js frontend). packages/ has ~90 shared packages. Key packages: shared-ui (components), brand (tokens/motion), command-palette (registry/executor), api-client (generic http+hooks), realtime, webrtc, server-core.
